creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Michael: 
Thank you for your offer to maintain this unmaintained port. 
I can cut through a lot of FAQ's here, and help you on your road to maintaining this port. 
In your pr, you should include the patch for everything: 
what is missing:  
* you should change maintainer 
* you need to update distfile 

As this is, I doubt it will 'fetch', but give you size/checksum mismatches. 

Additionally (and I have not check this yet) 
update portlint (ports-mgmt/portlint), and run: 
portlint -abc 

You can find more information in porters-handbook on FreeBSD.org, and, feel free to ask questions on freebsd-ports maiiling  
list. 

I will test your port in a tinderbox as soon as you attach a revised patch to this pr 
email an ascii attachment,  
to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org,  
subject line: Re: ports/169014: devel/libtecla: enhance command cannot find pseudo-terminal
